units.title: My Body - Part 2
units.subtitle: Arms, Legs, Hands, Feet and Actions

lessons.title: Move Your Body
lessons.topic: Main limbs and the grammar of commands

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you touch after you touch your head in the song?
questions.hint: It's between your neck and arms.

questions.question_text: Which body part helps you smell things?
questions.hint: It's in the middle of your face.

questions.question_text: Which part do you use to walk and run?
questions.hint: They are at the bottom of your legs.

items.definition: At the end of your arm

steps.title: Ella's Fun Day
steps.text: Hi! I am Ella. I have two strong legs. I can stomp my feet. Clap your hands with me. Let's play!

questions.question: How many legs does Ella have?

steps.explanation: Use 'Clap your' to ask for clapping.

steps.audio_text: Hello there! Let's move around. Touch your arm and clap your hands. Can you follow along?

steps.prompt: Action: Can you say 'Touch your arm'?

questions.question_text: Touch your ___. (Fill in the correct word to complete the command!)
Which is a leg? (Choose the correct body part.)
True or False: A foot is on your head.
Which sentence is correct? (Choose the right grammar pattern.)
What do you use to clap? (Reading comprehension)

lessons.title: Ten Fingers
lessons.topic: Small body parts and plural review

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to hear sounds and music?
questions.hint: It's on your head, one on each side.

questions.question_text: What do you use to smell a flower?
questions.hint: You find this in the middle of your face.

questions.question_text: What do you use to kick a ball?
questions.hint: It's at the end of your leg.

items.example: Touch your finger to your nose.
I have a long jump rope.

items.definition: Not big from end to end

steps.title: Wiggle and Clap!
steps.text: Wiggle your fingers! I have ten fingers. Clap your hands! I have ten toes. My toes are short. Touch your toes and smile.

questions.question: How many fingers do they have?
What should you do after touching your toes?

steps.explanation: We say "are" for more than one.

steps.audio_text: I have ten fingers and ten toes. Can you wiggle your fingers and stomp your feet?

questions.question: What do I have ten of?
What should you do after wiggling your fingers?

questions.question_text: What is another word for 'finger'? (Vocabulary question)
Fill in the blank: 'These ___ long toes.' (Grammar question)
What is on the end of your foot? (Reading comprehension)
True or False: Fingers are short. (General understanding)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to listen to music?
questions.hint: Think about what listens all the time.

questions.question_text: Which moves when you snap your fingers?
questions.hint: Think about what's at the end of your hand.

questions.question_text: What helps you give a thumbs up?
questions.hint: It's a special part of your hand.

steps.title: Dance with Me!
steps.text: Clap your hands and say, 'I have two hands!' Stomp your feet and shout, 'I have two feet!' Touch your knees and shoulders. Great job, everyone!

questions.question: What do you do with your feet?
How many hands do you have?

steps.audio_text: Let's do some actions! First, clap your hands and then touch your knees. Now, stomp your feet and say, 'I have two shoulders!'

questions.question: What do you touch after clapping?
How many shoulders do you have?

questions.question_text: Touch your ___ when you clap. (Grammar question)
Which is a part of your body? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: You use your knees to jump.
What do you do with your feet? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What part of your body helps you see?
questions.hint: Think about what you use to look at things.

questions.question_text: Which body part do you use to walk?
questions.hint: You stand on these parts and they have toes.

questions.question_text: What do you use to smell flowers?
questions.hint: It's in the middle of your face and helps you breathe.

steps.title: Super Day with My Body
steps.text: I have two eyes and a nose. I can see the sky. Touch your nose! I have ten toes. I can stomp my feet. My hands can clap. Touch your shoulders!

questions.question: How many toes does the character have?
What can the character do with hands?

steps.audio_text: I have two small ears and a big smile. Watch me jump up and down with joy!

questions.question: How many ears does he have?
Can he jump up and down?

steps.prompt: Say: 'I have two feet and two legs.'
steps.expected_text: i have two feet and two legs

questions.question_text: Touch your ___! (Grammar question)
Which action is clapping? (Vocabulary question)
I have two ___ (Reading comprehension question).
Can you stomp your feet? (Grammar question)
Which part helps you smell? (Vocabulary question)
